title: AN ACT DECLARING AUGUST 18 OF EVERY YEAR AS ГўВЂВњJESSE ROBREDO DAYГўВЂВќ, A SPECIAL WORKING HOLIDAY, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

chunks.text:
H. No. 4768; 111 OG No. 39, 5664 (September 28, 2015)

[ REPUBLIC ACT No. 10669, August 18, 2015 ]

AN ACT DECLARING AUGUST 18 OF EVERY YEAR AS ГўВЂВњJESSE ROBREDO DAYГўВЂВќ, A SPECIAL WORKING HOLIDAY, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled.

SECTION 1.

Title.

ГўВЂВ“ This Act shall be known as ГўВЂВњJesse Robredo DayГўВЂВќ.

SEC. 2.

Special Working Holiday

. ГўВЂВ“ August 18 of every year is hereby declared as ГўВЂВњJesse Robredo DayГўВЂВќ, which shall be a special working holiday, to be celebrated in all elementary and secondary schools in the country. In the event that the holiday falls on a weekend, the holiday shall be observed on the Friday of that week.

SEC. 3.

Implementing Agency

. ГўВЂВ“ The Department of Education shall plan and implement activities for the ГўВЂВњJesse Robredo DayГўВЂВќ, and ensure that Jesse RobredoГўВЂВ™s legacy of good governance and leadership is given emphasis to encourage students to continue the same for the good of the Philippines and the Filipino people.

SEC. 4.

Separability Clause.

ГўВЂВ“ If any provision of this Act is declared unconstitutional, the same shall not affect the validity and effectivity of the other provisions hereof.

SEC. 5.

Repealing Clause

. ГўВЂВ“ All laws, decrees, orders and issuances or portions thereof which are inconsistent with the provisions of this Act are hereby repealed, amended or modified accordingly.

SEC. 6.

Effectivity

. ГўВЂВ“ This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days following its publication in at least two (2) national newspapers of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.) FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

(SGD.) FRANKLIN M. DRILON

President of the Senate

Senate Bill No. 1281, which was approved by the Senate on June 9, 2014, was adopted as an amendment to House Bill No. 4768 by the House of Representatives on May 12, 2015.

(SGD.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

(SGD.) OSCAR G. YABES

Secretary of the Senate

Approved: AUGUST 18, 2015

(SGD.) BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
